predictions.flag_text: Futures volume anomaly: pre-war window insider knowledge pattern. BETS OFF Act, Trump Jr./Polymarket conflict, federal prosecutors involved.
Iran-Oman Hormuz protocol subsumed into ceasefire coordination language.
Araghchi confirmed 10-point plan as negotiation basis. Islamabad window open.

predictions.outcome: CONFIRMED — 05 April. SEAL Team Six, CIA deception, 2 MC-130Js destroyed.

predictions.flag_text: GCC emergency meeting within 48h of UNSC veto. Monitor post-ceasefire positioning.
Sixth deadline mechanism confirmed: Tuesday 8pm ET.
Houthi BAM threat not activated. Ceasefire suspends trigger condition.
India oil waiver expires 19 April. No US sanctions response yet.
OPEC+ no reversal. 206,000 b/d increase proceeded.
predictions.outcome: CONTRADICTED. PMM: Hypothesis B confirmed — analysis underweighted producer bloc cohesion. System change: producer bloc solidarity treated as prior in OPEC+ cases.

predictions.flag_text: No power plant strikes before ceasefire.
Trump/Vance public statement on enrichment by 10 April 18:00 BST.
predictions.outcome: PARTIAL — Trump stated no enrichment of uranium 8 April (Tier 1). Formal enrichment framework for talks not confirmed. C3 satisfied, C2 partially satisfied.

predictions.flag_text: Hezbollah formal ceasefire statement by 09 April 18:00 BST.
predictions.outcome: CONTRADICTED — Window expired 09 April 17:00 GMT. No formal statement issued. Hezbollah subsequently resumed rocket fire into northern Israel 09-10 April. PMM triggered — see SYSTEM_CHANGE_LOG.md Entry 001.

predictions.flag_text: Iran's delegation at Islamabad will formally table written 10-point plan explicitly including uranium enrichment rights, causing US to issue public red line statement before talks conclude 10 April.
predictions.outcome: PARTIAL — Iran did not formally table a written 10-point plan. Instead Ghalibaf issued public preconditions before talks. Enrichment contradiction surfaced as dominant pre-talk dispute (C3 satisfied). Written plan not tabled at session (C2 partially satisfied). No formal US red-line statement issued in those exact terms. PMM not triggered.

predictions.flag_text: Hezbollah will issue formal statement by 09 April 17:00 GMT stating it will not observe ceasefire unless Israel halts Lebanon strikes.
predictions.outcome: PARTIAL — Hezbollah unnamed official confirmed non-adherence to AP. Spirit of prediction met. Letter not met — source was unnamed, no formal Al Manar or Al Mayadeen statement issued. Hezbollah subsequently fired rockets into northern Israel. C2 partially satisfied. PMM not triggered.

predictions.flag_text: The Islamabad talks will produce a ceasefire extension of at least 7 days beyond 22 April as the sole confirmed output of the first session — without a binding framework on Hormuz, enrichment, or Lebanon scope.
